title: Facilities, Racks, Cabling, Power, and Environment
description: Plan an MDF, IDFs, racks, patching, power, cooling, security, and maintenance access for a new site. Learners cumulatively produce a complete first version of a facilities-ready network installation package while every earlier competency remains active through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Place distribution spaces, racks, panels, pathways, and devices for service and safety.
Calculate power and redundancy without exceeding circuits or PoE budgets.
Control temperature, humidity, airflow, fire, and physical access risks.
